data.short_description: Mr. Po' Boyz Burgers and Seafood soft-launched on April 24 at a familiar north end Beaumont location with a Mardi Gras color scheme. A formal grand opening is scheduled for May 16. The restaurant serves a variety of burgers and seafood items.

data.location: 71 South Main St., Newtown, CT (zip not specified)
data.short_description: jjStacks, a bar and grill offering over 100 wing varieties, burgers, and a sports bar atmosphere, has opened at the former Eggs & Co. space in Newtown. A ribbon-cutting ceremony is scheduled for 2 p.m. on May 18. The Newtown location marks the brand's first brick-and-mortar restaurant.

data.location: 5484 Lena Road, Bradenton, FL (zip not specified)
data.status: opening soon; grand opening at 11 a.m. Monday
data.short_description: Saucy! by KFC is opening its first Manatee County location at 5484 Lena Road, off State Road 70 near Interstate 75 in Bradenton. The grand opening is scheduled for 11 a.m. Monday with giveaways and complimentary bites. The location introduces two new menu items: the Big Sammie and Saucy! x DRIPS by Pepsi drinks.

data.location: 660 Merril Road, Pittsfield, MA (zip not specified) — Stop & Shop Plaza
data.short_description: A job posting on Indeed revealed a new Jersey Mike's Subs location is planned for 660 Merril Road in Pittsfield, in the Stop & Shop Plaza next to Pizza Hut. The franchise will be operated by Liotta Brothers LLC, with limited details available so far. No confirmed opening date has been announced.

data.location: Address not specified — uptown/South End, Charlotte, NC, near Carson Station light rail
data.status: in the final stages of construction and inspections; opening in May
data.short_description: Market on Morehead is a full-service restaurant and bar opening in Charlotte in May 2026, positioned near the light rail's Carson Station with seating for 200 inside and 150 outdoors. The restaurant is a sister spot to Market on Main in Columbia, South Carolina, and features a 25-foot LED Jumbotron, a 40-seat bar, and Rail Trail patio views. Co-founder Josh Willoughby has worked for the past year to finalize the space.

data.location: Namba district, Osaka, Japan — near Nankai Shin-Imamiya and Namba Stations (full address not specified)
data.short_description: Centara Hotels & Resorts has opened Centara Life Namba Hotel Osaka, its second property in Japan, in the heart of Osaka's Namba district. The hotel features 300 non-smoking rooms, a rooftop lounge (SORA), and a breakfast dining venue (DINING). It is positioned as a lifestyle-led property offering convenience and value for a range of travellers.

data.location: Airport Road, Mohali, India (full address not specified)
data.short_description: Ramee Group of Hotels announced the opening of Ramee Collection Airport Road, Mohali, developed in partnership with Pure Hotel Pvt. Ltd. This marks the Group's first entry into the Tricity market of Mohali, Chandigarh, and Panchkula, and follows the brand's boutique presence in Amritsar. The property is positioned as a boutique hospitality destination targeting the North India luxury travel market.

data.store_name: Kerala Hotel and Restaurants Association (KHRA) member hotels/restaurants (statewide)
data.location: Kerala, India (statewide; specific addresses not specified)
data.short_description: KHRA announced a statewide shutdown of hotels and restaurants on May 6 to protest a sharp increase in commercial LPG prices. The Centre raised the price of 19 kg commercial LPG cylinders by ₹993, pushing costs beyond ₹3,000 in the state. Industry representatives warned that menu prices may need to rise by 50–60% to sustain operations.

data.event_date: "This week" (relative to article date of May 4, 2026)
data.short_description: Chiappini's Gulf Station, a convenience store and gathering spot in Melrose, FL, is closing after 91 years in business as the third-generation owners, Mark and Robin Chiappini, retire. The store has operated since 1935 and served as a community hub with beer, bait, propane, and live music. No word was given on what will replace it.

data.location: 1250 Caroline St., Atlanta, GA 30307 (Edgewood Retail District)
data.event_date: Late summer 2026 (approximately four months from article date)
data.status: slated to open in late summer
data.short_description: Utah-based dessert franchise Crumbl is opening a 1,403-square-foot location at 1250 Caroline St. in Atlanta's Edgewood Retail District, operated by KTP Capital. This will be KTP Capital's second Crumbl location, joining an existing location in Toco Hills, and is positioned to serve high population density in the city.

data.location: Sugar Land Town Square, Sugar Land, TX (full address not specified)
data.short_description: Rainbow Cloudz has opened a second location in Sugar Land Town Square, selling plushies, Pokémon, Labubus, accessories, and other collectible items. The store also operates as a slime bar in partnership with Kawaii Slime Company and as a children's party venue. No reservation is required during store hours for walk-in slime bar access.

data.location: Lower Hill District, Pittsburgh, PA (full address not specified) — adjacent to PPG Paints Arena
data.short_description: Citizens Live at the Wylie is a new 4,000-capacity live music venue in Pittsburgh's Lower Hill District set to debut in fall 2026. Pittsburgh native Wiz Khalifa is set to headline the kickoff on October 2, with additional shows announced through January 2027. The venue features a general admission floor, balcony seating, a rooftop lounge, and premium hospitality areas.

data.status: N/A — trade show event, not a retail/restaurant opening or closure

data.event_date: Construction September 2026 – August 2027 (opening date not specified)
data.status: planned for construction September 2026 to August 2027
data.short_description: Walmart is planning a new 174,579-square-foot store at 860 FB Schwertner Rd in Jarrell, TX, with construction estimated to cost $12.2 million. The construction timeline runs from this September to August 2027, per a Texas Department of Licensing and Regulation filing. No specific opening date is stated.

data.location: 400 Mosaic Court, St. Joseph, MO (zip not specified)
data.event_date: Soft opening: April 20; Ribbon cutting: May 7; Grand Opening: May 9
data.short_description: The Rolling Hills Consolidated Library's new Riverside branch soft-opened April 20 after more than two years of planning and 18 months of construction. A ribbon-cutting is scheduled for May 7 and a grand opening on May 9, featuring an all-day open house with tours and giveaways. The 36,000-square-foot facility houses the library's largest branch, the Bookmobile office, Administration Office, and a used bookstore.

data.location: El Camino Promenade, Encinitas, CA (full address not specified — off El Camino Real and Via Molena)
data.status: slated to open; grand opening celebration May 14
data.short_description: Nordstrom Rack is opening a new 24,000-square-foot location at El Camino Promenade in Encinitas, with a grand opening celebration scheduled for May 14 at 9 a.m. The event will feature a DJ, light bites, gift card giveaways, and an Operation Warm charity shopping experience. The store is the off-price retail division of Nordstrom, offering up to 70% off apparel, accessories, beauty products, home decor, and shoes.

data.location: Miller Hill Mall, Fountain Court, Duluth, MN (full address not specified)
data.status: opening planned for this fall; construction already underway
data.short_description: Carter's, a children's apparel and accessories retailer, is opening a new location at Miller Hill Mall in Duluth, MN, with construction already underway and an opening planned for fall 2026. This will be the first dedicated Carter's location in the Duluth area, with the nearest current locations requiring a significant drive south. The mall expects the store to be open in time for the holiday shopping season.

data.location: 1805 Vestal Parkway East, Vestal, NY (zip not specified)
data.event_date: Wednesday or Thursday (relative to article date of May 4, 2026)
data.status: expects to hold the grand opening starting Wednesday or Thursday
data.short_description: Piccolo's Pizzeria is preparing to open at 1805 Vestal Parkway East in Vestal, at the former site of a Subway sandwich shop. The restaurant, owned by Frank LoPiccolo who also owns Frank's Italian Restaurant in the town of Maine, will feature indoor dining, an outdoor deck, and access from the Vestal Rail Trail. The grand opening was initially planned for January but was delayed.

data.status: N/A — operational change, not a new opening or closure

data.location: Montrose Shopping Center, Rockville, MD — Randolph Road (full address not specified)
data.short_description: Goodwill is opening a new retail store and donation center at the Montrose Shopping Center in Rockville, MD, on May 9 at 9 a.m., offering 25% off purchases of $50 or more at the grand opening. The location takes over a space previously occupied by Planet Aid, which closed in September. A separate new Goodwill location is also expected to open this spring at Waters Village Shopping Center in Germantown.

data.short_description: A second new Goodwill location is expected to open this spring at Waters Village Shopping Center in Germantown, MD. No further details on opening date or store size were provided in the article.

data.location: Former Bahama Breeze location, Gainesville, FL (full address not specified)
data.short_description: Cheddar's Scratch Kitchen is opening in a former Bahama Breeze location in Gainesville, FL on May 11, after Darden Restaurants closed all 28 Bahama Breeze US locations on April 5. Both chains are owned by Darden Restaurants, which announced that half of the closed Bahama Breeze locations would be converted to other formats.
